name: Weekend Skillet Breakfast
recipeIngredient: 1 medium potato (peeled & cubed into small cubes)
8 ounces cholesterol-free egg substitute or 4 eggs (beaten)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bacon and the potato in a non-stick skillet. Cook over medium heat for 12 minutes, stirring frequently until the potatoes are fork tender.
2. Stir in the onions and chili powder. Pour the egg substitute (or beaten eggs) evenly over the mixture. Cover and reduce heat to low. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the mixture is set.
3. Cut into wedges and serve.
Calories: 155
Cholesterol: 30mg
Fat: 7g
Sodium: 650mg
